title: Warm Smoked Slovakian Pork Tagine
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring smoked paprika and grilled pork, served in a ceramic tagine, perfect for a cold evening meal
instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the pork shoulder with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper
Grill the pork shoulder for 20 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit
Heat the olive oil in the ceramic tagine over medium heat
Add the chopped onion to the tagine and cook until it is softened, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic to the tagine and cook for an additional 1 minute
Add the prunes, chicken broth, and lemon juice to the tagine
Add the grilled pork shoulder to the tagine and simmer for 10 minutes
Serve the pork and sauce hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired
